overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand medieval great hall filled with dining guests. The scene features soaring stone Gothic architecture, numerous hanging chandeliers with warm candlelight, and long wooden banquet tables laden with food. The camera maintains an elevated, static observation point overlooking the bustling hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with banquet seating

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated camera slowly panning across the great hall, observing the dining crowd

notable_agents.action: group of diners seated at long table, eating and conversing
individual in dark robes seated at foreground table

entered.detail: numerous ornate chandeliers with lit candles suspended from the high vaulted ceiling
tall pointed Gothic arches along the stone walls
lengthy wooden tables arranged in rows, covered with food and dining ware
tall narrow windows with stone tracery allowing diffused daylight
massive stone columns supporting the arched ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The camera holds an elevated view of a vast Gothic great hall illuminated by countless hanging chandeliers. Dense crowds of NPCs sit at long wooden banquet tables eating and socializing. The stone architecture features tall arches and columns, while warm golden light from the candles creates an atmospheric medieval ambiance. The scene remains static with minimal camera movement, focusing on the lively dining hall environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a grand medieval great hall, capturing the atmospheric scale of a bustling banquet. It begins by overlooking a vast Gothic space where countless hanging chandeliers cast a warm golden glow over the stone architecture. As the camera holds its position, the focus settles on the dense crowds of guests socializing and eating at long wooden banquet tables. The scene remains immersive and static, emphasizing the interplay between the soaring arches and the lively, candlelit ambiance of the dining hall.
